headline: Chevron vs. ConocoPhillips: Only One of These Energy Dividends Is Safe to Hold Forever
summary: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) and ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) closed 2025 with results that expose a fundamental divide in how two oil giants handle commodity downturns. One relies on a diversified, integrated model. The other bets on pure-play discipline and shale inventory. The dividend question cuts to the heart of that difference.
